# Ghulam Mujtaba — Full Portfolio Reference (LLM-Optimized)

> structured information about Ghulam Mujtaba and his work.
> Canonical site: https://ghulammujtaba.com

---

## Identity

- **Full Name**: Ghulam Mujtaba
- **Profession**: Full Stack Developer · Data Scientist · AI/ML Specialist · Technical Founder
- **Location**: Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan
- **Email**: ghulammujtaba1005@gmail.com
- **Portfolio**: https://ghulammujtaba.com
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ghulamujtabaofficial
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/ghulam-mujtaba5

---

## Professional Summary

Ghulam Mujtaba is a software engineer and entrepreneur from Lahore, Pakistan, specializing in full-stack web development, mobile app development, data science, and AI/ML engineering. He has spent 3+ years contributing to AI projects for Meta and other FANG-tier companies through Appen, working on LLM training, evaluation, search relevance, and data annotation.

He is the founder of Megicode, a software consultancy and development agency, and the co-founder of CampusAxis, Pakistan's leading university platform connecting students and faculty across 260+ institutions.

He is currently completing his Bachelor of Software Engineering at COMSATS University Islamabad, Lahore Campus (Class of 2026).

---

## Technical Skills

### Languages
JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Java, C, C++, R

### Frontend
React.js, Next.js, HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS

### Backend
Node.js, Express.js, Spring Boot, REST APIs, GraphQL

### AI / ML / Data Science
TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, OpenCV, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, LLM Evaluation, Prompt Engineering, Data Annotation, Search Relevance, Big Data Analytics, Data Visualization, Microsoft Power BI

### Mobile
React Native, Flutter

### Databases
MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Firebase

### Cloud & DevOps
AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Vercel, Git, GitHub

### Design & UX
Figma, Adobe XD, UI/UX Design, Prototyping, User Research

---

**Bachelor of Software Engineering (BSE)**
COMSATS University Islamabad, Lahore Campus

---

## Experience

### Founder & CEO — Megicode (2025–present)
Software consultancy and development agency. Provides end-to-end product development services including web apps, mobile apps, UI/UX design, and AI integration for startups and SMEs.

### Co-Founder & Technical Lead — CampusAxis (2024–present)
University platform serving 260+ Pakistani universities. Built and scaled the platform to serve students, faculty, and administrators across Pakistan. Handles authentication, feeds, events, notes, and administrative workflows.

### AI/ML Data Specialist — Appen (2021–present, remote)
3+ years of AI/ML project work for Meta and FANG-tier clients. Responsibilities include: LLM evaluation and red-teaming, search relevance assessment, data annotation, model quality benchmarking, prompt quality assessment.

---

## Projects

### CampusAxis — University Portal
A comprehensive platform for Pakistani universities. Features: student profiles, faculty portals, university feeds, academic resources, event management, notes sharing, and admin dashboards.
- URL: https://ghulammujtaba.com/projects/campusaxis-university-portal
- Live: https://www.campusaxis.com

### MegiLance — AI + Blockchain Freelancing Platform (FYP)
Final Year Project. An AI-powered freelancing marketplace with blockchain-based payment escrow, smart contracts for milestones, and an AI assistant for project matching and proposal generation.
- URL: https://ghulammujtaba.com/projects/megilance-ai-blockchain-freelancing-platform-fyp

### PakUni App
Mobile app for discovering, comparing, and applying to universities in Pakistan. Aggregates admission data, fee structures, rankings, and campus information.
- URL: https://ghulammujtaba.com/projects/pakuni-app

### HealSmart — Mobile Health App
AI-assisted mobile health application offering symptom checking, appointment booking, and health record management.
- URL: https://ghulammujtaba.com/projects/healsmart-mobile-app

### Aesthetics Clinic Website & Management System
Full-stack web application for a medical aesthetics clinic including appointment scheduling, client management, service catalog, and admin dashboard.
- URL: https://ghulammujtaba.com/projects/aesthetics-clinic-website-management-system

### PulseFocus — Desktop App
Productivity desktop application for focus sessions, task management, and time tracking.
- URL: https://ghulammujtaba.com/projects/pulsefocus-desktop-app

### MegiCloth — E-Commerce Platform
Full-stack clothing e-commerce platform with product catalog, cart, checkout, order tracking, and admin panel.
- URL: https://ghulammujtaba.com/projects/megicloth-e-commerce-platform

### DigiFinsense — Mobile App
Personal finance tracking mobile application with expense categorization, budgeting, and analytics dashboards.
- URL: https://ghulammujtaba.com/projects/digifinsense-mobile-app

## Articles & Technical Writing

Ghulam writes about full-stack development, AI engineering, and startup topics.
Browse all articles: https://ghulammujtaba.com/articles

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Who is Ghulam Mujtaba?**
Ghulam Mujtaba is a Pakistani software engineer and technical founder specializing in full-stack development, AI/ML, and data science. He is the founder of Megicode and co-founder of CampusAxis.

**What does Ghulam Mujtaba build?**
He builds web applications, mobile apps, AI/ML systems, and SaaS products. His work spans e-commerce, edtech, healthtech, fintech, and productivity software.

**Where is Ghulam Mujtaba based?**
Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan. He works remotely for international clients and locally for Pakistani startups.

**How can I hire or collaborate with Ghulam Mujtaba?**
Contact via: https://ghulammujtaba.com/#contact-section or email ghulammujtaba1005@gmail.com

**What is Megicode?**
Megicode (https://www.megicode.com) is Ghulam Mujtaba's software consultancy offering full-stack development, UI/UX design, mobile development, and AI integration services.

**What is CampusAxis?**
CampusAxis (https://www.campusaxis.com) is a university platform for Pakistan, co-founded by Ghulam Mujtaba, serving students and faculty across 260+ universities.
